references.what_akin_likes: The font choice, the How We Work section, gold on dark palette
references.layout_patterns: Full-width hero with dark overlay, two-column services (residential/commercial), 4-step process section, testimonial carousel, portfolio grid
references.spacing: Generous — 5% horizontal padding, 1.5rem preset spacing, flexbox gaps throughout
references.typography: Karla (sans-serif) as primary font, system defaults for body. No display serif, but the gold colour adds the warmth that a serif would
references.colour_usage: Gold #aa9a5d on black #000000 is the entire identity. Darkened gold #857a4d for hover. White text on dark backgrounds throughout. Very disciplined two-colour scheme.
references.interactions: Smooth scroll (500ms), lazy-loaded images, scroll-to-top button, hover overlays on gallery items with rgba(0,0,0,0.7)
references.premium_signals: Gold accent on black communicates luxury. Photography style is atmospheric and dark. Language uses 'bespoke' and 'craftsmanship'. Testimonials from architects and designers position them upmarket.

references.what_akin_likes: Excellent portfolio/gallery page — how they present work
references.layout_patterns: Full-screen slideshow rather than grid. One project at a time, autoplay with fade transitions (2s intervals). Dot indicators for navigation. 3:2 aspect ratio images throughout.
references.spacing: Minimal — the image IS the page. 20px grid spacing in underlying config but slideshow format makes it full-bleed.
references.typography: Project title only in gallery view, no descriptions or tags. Minimal text lets the images dominate.
references.colour_usage: Neutral — white arrows on dark backgrounds. Gallery info overlay uses rgba(0,0,0,0.7). Photography provides all colour.
references.interactions: Autoplay slideshow, fade transitions, hover to reveal project info overlay, dot navigation indicators
references.premium_signals: Full-screen presentation treats each project as important. The slideshow format forces attention on one piece of work at a time — it's curated, not dumped.

references.layout_patterns: Image-heavy, full-width backgrounds, alternating text/image content blocks, categorised galleries by room type
references.spacing: Generous whitespace between sections, content breathes
references.typography: Mixed serif/sans — serif headings for elegance, sans body for readability
references.colour_usage: Dark backgrounds, near-black, restrained highlights. Photography does the colour work.
references.premium_signals: The darkness and restraint communicate exclusivity. Language emphasises meticulous craftsmanship. Case studies rather than simple galleries.

common_threads: All three references use dark palettes with warm accents. Gold/amber on black is the joinery luxury signature. Typography is clean and restrained. Photography is atmospheric rather than clinical. The best gallery approach (SPLINTR) treats each project as a full-screen moment rather than a thumbnail grid.
design_direction_summary: For Adkin Joinery: dark palette with warm accent (gold or amber), clean sans-serif typography with optional serif for section headers, process-driven content to compensate for limited photography, gallery that looks intentional even with few images. The design must carry the weight that professional photography would normally carry.
